[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001011 4
1 0000000000 a
2 0000000000 a
3 0000000000 a
4 0111011000 5
5 0100001110 4
6 0001010100 3
7 1011001100 5

01 10 0111011110 7
12 21 0101011110 6
23 32 1011011100 6
34 43 1011011111 8
45 54 1011111111 9
56 65 1001110100 5
67 76 1011101111 8
70 07 1111111111 a

02 20 0111011100 6
13 31 1111001110 7
24 42 0011011111 7
35 53 1011111100 7
46 64 1011011111 8
57 75 1011111111 9
60 06 1111011100 7
71 17 1110101111 8

03 30 1111011100 7
14 41 0111011111 8
25 52 1001110100 5
36 63 1011001100 5 match 7
47 74 1011111111 9
50 05 1111111100 8
61 16 1101001110 6
72 27 1011111111 9

04 40 0111011011 7
15 51 1101111110 8
26 62 1001010100 4
37 73 1011101111 8
